race.comment: FELASUVI (4) was in the money two starts back at this track but was unable to repeat the effort last time when eighth over 1500m here. Faces an easier assignment and shapes as a major player. BATTLEDANCE (1) has returned in good order this preparation. Opened with a third at Taree two starts back, then landed the prize by a nose over 1250m at Taree. Jenny Duggan scored on him last time and retains the mount. Has the talent to produce another positive result. LIKA REMI (9) made it back-to-back wins when successful over 1200m at Tuncurry.  Best figures measure up. Sure to run well. BLUE DANE (8) was too good for a maiden field last start over 1212m at Coffs Harbour. Must be respected now that the penny has dropped.
